steps.title: Use the given form of the linear function
steps.content:
The linear function is $f(x) = 8x + b$, and we are told that $f(9) = 72$. Substitute $x = 9$:
$$8(9) + b = 72$$

steps.title: Solve for $b$
steps.content:
Simplify and isolate $b$:
$$72 + b = 72$$
$$b = 0$$
That matches choice A — A is correct.
